description.unified: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
Deals Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for [1.8 sec->1sec]. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

Deals Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for [1.8 sec->1sec], and reduces their Critical Chance by [100%->25%] for 7sec. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.
Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing Magic Damage, knocking them back for [1.2 sec->0.5sec], and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

dark.unified: Stuns enemies hit for [1.2 seconds->1 sec].
For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150.
Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [30%->10%], and damage taken is reduced by [30%->10%].
